lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਸੋਹੇ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸਾਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jin man vasiaa se jan sohe hiradai naam vasaae |3|
lines.english: Those whose minds are filled with the Naam are beautiful; they enshrine the Naam within their hearts. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰੁ ਦਰੁ ਮਹਲੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਦਿਖਾਇਆ ਰੰਗ ਸਿਉ ਰਲੀਆ ਮਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: ghar dar mehal satiguroo dikhaaeaa rang siau raleea maanai |
lines.english: The True Guru has revealed to me the Lord's Home and His Court, and the Mansion of His Presence. I joyfully enjoy His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਹੈ ਸੁ ਭਲਾ ਕਰਿ ਮਾਨੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਖਾਣੈ ॥੪॥੬॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: jo kichh kahai su bhalaa kar maanai naanak naam vakhaanai |4|6|16|
lines.english: Whatever He says, I accept as good; Nanak chants the Naam. ||4||6||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਸਾ ਮਨਹਿ ਸਮਾਇ ਲੈ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਵੀਚਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: manasaa maneh samaae lai gurasabadee veechaar |
lines.english: The desires of the mind are absorbed in the mind, contemplating the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈਰਉ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: bhairau mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Bhairao, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਤੇ ਸੋਝੀ ਪਵੈ ਫਿਰਿ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਵਾਰੋ ਵਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur poore te sojhee pavai fir marai na vaaro vaar |1|
lines.english: Understanding is obtained from the Perfect Guru, and then the mortal does not die over and over again. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਭ ਇਛ ਪੁਜਾਵਣਹਾਰੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaad param pad paaeaa sabh ichh pujaavanahaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, I have obtained the supreme status; the Lord is the Fulfiller of all desires. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਆਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: man mere raam naam aadhaar |
lines.english: My mind takes the Support of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪ੍ਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਆ ਮੇਰਾ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh pragatt hoaa meraa har prabh anadin har gun gaae |2|
lines.english: My Lord God has been revealed to me, and I have become Gurmukh. Night and day, I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਏਕੋ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਬੂਝ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh meh eko rav rahiaa gur bin boojh na paae |
lines.english: The One Lord is permeating and pervading amongst all; without the Guru, this understanding is not obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਹੋਰ ਥੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਪਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sukhadaataa har ek hai hor thai sukh na paeh |
lines.english: The One Lord is the Giver of peace; peace is not found anywhere else.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਜਿਨੀ ਨ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਦਾਤਾ ਸੇ ਅੰਤਿ ਗਏ ਪਛੁਤਾਹਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: satigur jinee na seviaa daataa se ant ge pachhutaeh |3|
lines.english: Those who do not serve the Giver, the True Guru, depart regretfully in the end. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਫਿਰਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਧਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sev sadaa sukh paaeaa fir dukh na laagai dhaae |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, lasting peace is obtained, and the mortal does not suffer in pain any longer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਈ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੪॥੭॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: naanak har bhagat paraapat hoee jotee jot samaae |4|7|17|
lines.english: Nanak has been blessed with devotional worship of the Lord; his light has merged into the Light. ||4||7||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈਰਉ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: bhairau mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Bhairao, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਝੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਜਗਤੁ ਬਉਰਾਨਾ ਭੂਲਾ ਚੋਟਾ ਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: baajh guroo jagat bauraanaa bhoolaa chottaa khaaee |
lines.english: Without the Guru, the world is insane; confused and deluded, it is beaten, and it suffers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਿ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮੈ ਸਦਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ਦਰ ਕੀ ਖਬਰਿ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: mar mar jamai sadaa dukh paae dar kee khabar na paaee |1|
lines.english: It dies and dies again, and is reborn, always in pain, but it is unaware of the Lord's Gate. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੀਠਾ ਸਦ ਲਾਗਾ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੇ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਤਰਣਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hiradai har naam meetthaa sad laagaa gurasabade bhavajal taranaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Those people, to whose hearts the Lord's Name seems sweet, are carried across the terrifying world-ocean by the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਸਦਾ ਰਹਹੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: mere man sadaa rahahu satigur kee saranaa |
lines.english: O my mind, remain always in the Protection of the True Guru's Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਤਿਸਾ ਭੂਖ ਅਤਿ ਬਹੁਤੀ ਭਉਕਤ ਫਿਰੈ ਦਰ ਬਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: antar tisaa bhookh at bahutee bhaukat firai dar baar |2|
lines.english: Deep within is the great thirst and immense hunger; he wanders from door to door. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੇਖ ਕਰੈ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਚਿਤੁ ਡੋਲੈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: bhekh karai bahut chit ddolai antar kaam krodh ahankaar |
lines.english: The mortal wears various religious robes, but his consciousness is unsteady; deep within, he is filled with sexual desire, anger and egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਰਹਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਜੀਵਹਿ ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਦੁਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad mareh fir jeeveh tin kau mukat duaar |
lines.english: Those who die in the Word of the Guru's Shabad are reborn; they find the door of liberation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਖਿਆ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: antar saant sadaa sukh hovai har raakhiaa ur dhaar |3|
lines.english: With constant peace and tranquility deep within, they enshrine the Lord within their hearts. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਵੈ ਚਲਾਵੈ ਕਰਣਾ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jiau tis bhaavai tivai chalaavai karanaa kichhoo na jaaee |
lines.english: As it pleases Him, He inspires us to act. Nothing else can be done.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਸਮੑਾਲੇ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੪॥੮॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh sabad samaale raam naam vaddiaaee |4|8|18|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh contemplates the Word of the Shabad, and is blessed with the glorious greatness of the Lord's Name. ||4||8||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਖੁਆਇਆ ਦੁਖੁ ਖਟੇ ਦੁਖ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: haumai maaeaa mohi khuaaeaa dukh khatte dukh khaae |
lines.english: Lost in egotism, Maya and attachment, the mortal earns pain, and eats pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈਰਉ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: bhairau mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Bhairao, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਲੋਭ ਹਲਕੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਭਾਰੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਬਿਬੇਕ ਭਰਮਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: antar lobh halak dukh bhaaree bin bibek bharamaae |1|
lines.english: The great disease, the rabid disease of greed, is deep within him; he wanders around indiscriminately. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੁਪਨੈ ਨਹੀ ਚੇਤਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam supanai nahee chetiaa har siau kade na laagai piaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He does not remember the Lord's Name, even in his dreams. He is never in love with the Lord's Name. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਜੀਵਣੁ ਸੈਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh dhrig jeevan saisaar |
lines.english: The life of the self-willed manmukh in this world is cursed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤ ਉਲਟੀ ਹੋਵੈ ਖੋਜਿ ਲਹੈ ਜਨੁ ਕੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: satigur milai ta ulattee hovai khoj lahai jan koe |2|
lines.english: But when the mortal meets the True Guru, his way of looking at the world changes. How rare are those humble beings who seek and find the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਸੂਆ ਕਰਮ ਕਰੈ ਨਹੀ ਬੂਝੈ ਕੂੜੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਕੂੜੋ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: pasooaa karam karai nahee boojhai koorr kamaavai koorro hoe |
lines.english: He acts like a beast, and does not understand anything. Practicing falsehood, he becomes false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਸਦ ਵਸਿਆ ਪਾਇਆ ਗੁਣੀ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam ridai sad vasiaa paaeaa gunee nidhaan |
lines.english: That person, whose heart is forever filled with the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, obtains the Lord, the Treasure of Virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰਤਾ ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਏ ਆਪੇ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aape karataa kare karaae aape maarag paae |
lines.english: The Creator Himself acts, and causes all to act. He Himself places us on the path.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਾਇਆ ਚੂਕਾ ਮਨ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee pooraa paaeaa chookaa man abhimaan |3|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, he finds the Perfect Lord; the egotistical pride of his mind is eradicated. ||3||
